_comment: Auditable model price table. USD per MILLION tokens, public Anthropic API list prices (standard tier, <=200k context). The meter divides by 1e6. Update prices here only; never hard-code costs in code.
_cache_write_note: Claude Code headless uses 1h ephemeral prompt caching (verified: usage.cache_creation.ephemeral_1h_input_tokens). 1h cache-write is billed at 2x base input. Verified end-to-end against the CLI's own total_cost_usd on a Haiku probe to the cent ($0.0497103).

claude-opus-4-8._note: Opus 4.5+ generation pricing ($5/$25), NOT the older Opus 4.1 $15/$75. Confirmed live: a 3.0x divergence between the old rates and the CLI's own costUSD pinned the correct 1/3 values.
